**Hepatitis C**

<b><p>Community Support and Education Can Help Reduce Hepatitis C Transmission</b>
<b>Why are Hepatitis C cases important?</b><br> Hepatitis C is a  liver infection that is spread through contacting blood from an infected person. The spread of infection is primarily due to sharing sharps or other equipment used for drug injection. The best way to avoid Hepatitis C in our community is by responding to drug use issues and providing education and support <a href="https://www.cdc.gov/hepatitis-c/index.html" target=_blank>Center for Disease Control.</a>
</p>
